name: Two Brines for Smoking Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the flavored brine by adding your choice of flavorings such as garlic, shallots, tarragon, dill, thyme, etc.
2. Place the fish in the flavored brine and allow it to soak until fully immersed.
3. Remove the fish from the brine and rinse thoroughly with water.
4. Dry the fish completely before placing it on the smoker rack.
5. Smoke the fish according to your preferred method.
6. Store smoked fish in airtight plastic bags for up to one year if frozen.
